# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/Users/edwar/Documents/Repos/qpdf-wasm/packages/pdfly-wasm/wasm/cmake-build
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Build documentation
BUILD_DOC:BOOL=OFF

//Create distribution of manual
BUILD_DOC_DIST:BOOL=ON

//Build qpdf shared libraries
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Build qpdf static libraries
BUILD_STATIC_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Set options for running in CI
CI_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_AR:UNINITIALIZED=C:\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emar.bat

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CROSSCOMPILING_EMULATOR:UNINITIALIZED=C:/emsdk/node/22.16.0_64bit/bin/node.exe

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=C:\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\em++.bat

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR-NOTFOUND

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS-NOTFOUND

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=C:\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emcc.bat

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR-NOTFOUND

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS-NOTFOUND

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of build database during the build.
CMAKE_EXPORT_BUILD_DATABASE:BOOL=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/qpdf-wasm

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=CMAKE_LINKER-NOTFOUND

CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=C:/Users/edwar/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe/ninja.exe

CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:UNINITIALIZED=../emscripten-toolchain.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Enable to build Debian packages
CPACK_BINARY_DEB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build FreeBSD packages
CPACK_BINARY_FREEBSD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build IFW packages
CPACK_BINARY_IFW:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build NSIS packages
CPACK_BINARY_NSIS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build RPM packages
CPACK_BINARY_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build STGZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_STGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TBZ2 packages
CPACK_BINARY_TBZ2:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TGZ packages

//Enable to build TXZ packages

//Enable to build TZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TBZ2 source packages

//Enable to build TGZ source packages

CPACK_SOURCE_TZ:BOOL=ON

CPACK_SOURCE_ZIP:BOOL=OFF

//Build with next C++ standard version
CXX_NEXT:BOOL=OFF

//Specify default crypto; otherwise chosen automatically
DEFAULT_CRYPTO:STRING=

//Building with Emscripten
EMSCRIPTEN:BOOL=1

//Enable coverage reporting
ENABLE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable QTC test coverage
ENABLE_QTC:BOOL=OFF

//Include ABI-breaking changes CONSIDERED for the next major release
FUTURE:BOOL=OFF

//Automatically regenerate job files
GENERATE_AUTO_JOB:BOOL=OFF

//Install cmake package files
INSTALL_CMAKE_PACKAGE:BOOL=ON

//Install example files
INSTALL_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Install documentation
INSTALL_MANUAL:BOOL=OFF

//Install pkgconfig file
INSTALL_PKGCONFIG:BOOL=ON

LATEX:FILEPATH=LATEX-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
LATEXMK:FILEPATH=LATEXMK-NOTFOUND

LIBJPEG_H_PATH:PATH=/cache/sysroot/include

OSS_FUZZ:BOOL=OFF

//Disable pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=

//qpdf source directory
QPDF_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=C:/Users/edwar/Documents/Repos/qpdf-wasm/vendor/qpdf

//Whether qtest's output should be in color
QTEST_COLOR:BOOL=ON

//Require gnutls crypto
REQUIRE_CRYPTO_GNUTLS:BOOL=OFF

//Require native crypto provider
REQUIRE_CRYPTO_NATIVE:BOOL=ON

//Require openssl crypto
REQUIRE_CRYPTO_OPENSSL:BOOL=OFF

//Require shells for completion testing
REQUIRE_SHELLS:BOOL=OFF

//Show qtest output on failure
SHOW_FAILED_TEST_OUTPUT:BOOL=OFF

//Suppress use of OS-provided secure random numbers
SKIP_OS_SECURE_RANDOM:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
SPHINX:FILEPATH=SPHINX-NOTFOUND

//Enable any available external crypto provider
USE_IMPLICIT_CRYPTO:BOOL=OFF

//Use insecure random numbers
USE_INSECURE_RANDOM:BOOL=OFF

//Treat compiler warnings as errors
WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//zlib include path
ZLIB_H_PATH:PATH=/cache/sysroot/include

//zlib library
ZLIB_LIB_PATH:FILEPATH=z

ZOPFLI,:BOOL=OFF

HAVE_EXTERN_LONG_TIMEZONE:INTERNAL=
//Test HAVE_EXTERN_TM_GMTOFF
HAVE_EXTERN_TM_GMTOFF:INTERNAL=
//Have symbol fseeko
HAVE_FSEEKO:INTERNAL=
//Have symbol fseeko64
HAVE_FSEEKO64:INTERNAL=
//Have include inttypes.h
HAVE_INTTYPES_H:INTERNAL=
//Test HAVE_LD_SCRIPT

//Have symbol localtime_r
HAVE_LOCALTIME_R:INTERNAL=
//Test HAVE_MALLOC_INFO
HAVE_MALLOC_INFO:INTERNAL=
//Test HAVE_OPEN_MEMSTREAM
HAVE_OPEN_MEMSTREAM:INTERNAL=
//Have symbol random
HAVE_RANDOM:INTERNAL=

HAVE_SIZEOF_SIZE_T:INTERNAL=FALSE
//Have include stddef.h
HAVE_STDDEF_H:INTERNAL=
//Have include stdint.h
HAVE_STDINT_H:INTERNAL=

HAVE_SYS_TYPES_H:INTERNAL=
//Test LFS_WITHOUT_MACROS
LFS_WITHOUT_MACROS:INTERNAL=
//Test LFS_WITH_MACROS
LFS_WITH_MACROS:INTERNAL=

PKG_CONFIG_ARGN-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//CHECK_TYPE_SIZE: size_t unknown
SIZEOF_SIZE_T:INTERNAL=
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=C:/Program Files (x86)/qpdf-wasm
